title: v6.8 direction selection: Executable Quality Ledger
description: Run the post-v6.7 runtime-backed direction review and decide whether v6.8 should be Executable Quality Ledger. Acceptance: direction review artifact exists, release-state-audit is green, Council review approves or changes the frontier, and no implementation task is opened until the direction is approved. Stop condition: direction selection only; do not implement ledger commands in this task.
triage_notes: Opened because v6.7.0 shipped cleanly and situation-assess reports frontier-definition-needed.
